Table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2

Card of table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2

Name

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2

Code

RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2

DBMS

Snowflake


Description of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2

---------------------------------------

Details of the Source

---------------------------------------

Use the Following Table in Staging to Import the Data

T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANTS_TAX_ROWS

 

---------------------

Table creation:

---------------------

 

WITH CleanedProductCatalogVariant AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE, '-1')||

COALESCE(TO_VARCHAR(__LOAD_TS), '-1')

) AS MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY,

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE

FROM (

SELECT

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE,

__LOAD_TS,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

EVENTS_PRODUCTS_CODE

ORDER BY __LOAD_TS DESC

) AS rn

FROM DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG

WHERE EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE IS NOT NULL

)

WHERE rn = 1

),

RankedVariantTax AS (

SELECT

MD5(

COALESCE(vtr.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_TAX_CODE, '-1') ||

COALESCE(vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_USERGROUPCODE, '-1')

) AS RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW_KEY,

pcv.MDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_KEY,

vtr.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE AS COUNTRY_CODE_BK,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE AS PRODUCT_VARIANT_CODE_BK,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_ABSOLUTE AS VARIANT_TAX_ABSOLUTE_FLAG,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_CURRENCYCODE AS VARIANT_TAX_CURRENCY_CODE,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_ENDTIME AS VARIANT_TAX_END_TIME,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_PRICEGROUPCODE AS VARIANT_TAX_PRICE_GROUP_CODE,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_STARTTIME AS VARIANT_TAX_START_TIME,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_TAX_ABSOLUTE AS VARIANT_TAX_ABSOLUTE_FLAG,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_TAX_CODE AS VARIANT_TAX_CODE_BK,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_TAX_CURRENCYCODE AS VARIANT_TAX_CURRENCY_CODE,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_TAX_NAME_EN AS VARIANT_TAX_NAME,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_TAX_VALUE AS VARIANT_TAX_VALUE,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_USERGROUPCODE AS VARIANT_TAX_USER_GROUP_CODE_BK,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_VALUE AS VARIANT_TAX_ROW_VALUE,

ROW_NUMBER() OVER (

PARTITION BY

vtr.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_TAX_CODE,

vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_USERGROUPCODE

ORDER BY vtr.__LOAD_TS DESC

) AS row_priority

FROM

DB_CONS_STG_QAS.STG_DCE2.T_DCE2_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANTS_TAX_ROWS vtr

LEFT JOIN CleanedProductCatalogVariant pcv

ON vtr.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE = pcv.EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE

AND vtr.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE = pcv.EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE

)

SELECT *

FROM RankedVariantTax

WHERE row_priority = 1

;

 

 

---------------------

Primary Key(s)

---------------------

Primary key(s) Source: EVENTS_COUNTRY_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_TAX_CODE, EVENTS_PRODUCTS_VARIANTS_TAXROWS_USERGROUPCODE

Primary key(s) Target: PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW_KEY

 

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

-- PII data - The data classification is defined on the Entity attribute level. --

------------------------------------------------------------------------------

N/A

 

----------------------

Historization Type

----------------------

SCD1

 

----------

RLS

----------

based on COUNTRY_CODE_BK (events_country_code)

 

-----------------

Load Type

-----------------

Load type: DELTA

 

Target schema: PL_CONSUMERORDER

CKT_RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIAN

Code preview of the table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2

drop table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2 cascade;

--==============================================================
-- Table: RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2
--==============================================================
create or replace table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2 (

);

alter table RDE_PRODUCT_CATALOG_VARIANT_TAX_ROW2 set comment = 'Reference data entity defining tax rules assigned to a product variant, with tax codes, amounts, timeframes, and user groups, enabling compliant taxation and variant-level tax differentiation.';
